steps.name: user should be redirected to dashboard page
dashboard page should be displayed successfully
user navigates to Campaign Builder module

elements.name: TC_001 Verify Welcome Series campaign using Push node

steps.name: user enters campaign name as "Automation Campaign 1"
user enters campaign description as "This is a test campaign created using automation"

arguments.val: "This is a test campaign created using automation"

steps.name: user selects campaign type as "Welcome Series"
user selects audience as "Segment" and target audience as "All Users"
user clicks visual flow buildert tab
user adds "Push" node in visual flow
user clicks save and publish button
